name: Creamy Polenta with Butter and Cheese
recipeIngredient: Unsalted butter and freshly grated Parmesan cheese, for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy medium saucepan, bring 4 cups of water to a boil.
2. Reduce the heat to low and add the salt.
3. Slowly pour the polenta into the water, stirring constantly.
4. Keep stirring for about 5 minutes, until evenly thickened and soupy.
5. Adjust the heat to the lowest setting so that the polenta barely bubbles.
6. Cook for 30 to 45 minutes, stirring every few minutes to keep it from sticking to the pan.
7. If it gets too thick, just add water in small amounts until it is the consistency you want.
8. When done, serve immediately with butter and Parmesan cheese.
